title: Blood Spatter Analyst [BETA]
description: A melee weapons pack based off the popular Dexter Novels by Jeff Lindsay and the Dexter TV Series by Showtime.
body:
**Hello, Dexter Moggin...**

**Mod is in early development expect things to change and bugs to occur.**

This mod adds a weapons pack based off the [Dexter novels by Jeff Lindsay](https://dexter.fandom.com/wiki/Dexter_Novels) and the [Dexter TV series by Showtime](https://dexter.fandom.com/wiki/Dexter_(show)). The mod aims to add a variety of weapons from Dexter for survival or roleplay purposes. 

Each to most weapons will have their own crafting recipe and advancement when creating or obtaining that weapon.

**Current Weapons List:**
- Grant Model 514 Framing Hammer (Trinity)
- Sword of John (Doomsday)
- Stainless Steel Ice Pick Knife (The Butcher)
- Fire Axe (Minotaur Slayer)

This mod is semi-compatible with:
[![BetterCombat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d65cbe745229c36b7b97cb608926374724d8174.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)

**Planned Features**
- Compat with other mods
- More Weapons & Clothes (Armor)
- M99 (Etorphine) Syringe & Potion
- Better Advancement System

**Mod made with MCreator**

## 
**Join the discord for support for mods!**
